name: 8bitconcepts Research Papers
description: Independent research on enterprise AI strategy, governance, and operational risk. Programmatically discoverable index for AI agents and crawlers.

papers.title: Q2 2026 MCP Ecosystem Health
papers.summary: Live audit: 5,578 agent-ready sites indexed, only 575 (10.3%) pass a live JSON-RPC handshake. Category breakdown, newly-verified servers, and the regulated verticals still waiting to be built.

papers.title: Q2 2026 AI Engineering Hiring Snapshot
papers.summary: Live market data: 8,618 AI/ML engineering roles across 513 companies, $213k median, 599 new this week. OpenAI leads with 336 open roles.

papers.title: The Guardrails Gap
papers.summary: Why enterprise AI safety frameworks fail when agents act autonomously.

papers.title: The Hallucination Budget
papers.summary: Quantifying the cost of AI hallucinations and mitigation strategies for production systems.

papers.title: The Measurement Problem
papers.summary: How enterprises measure AI ROI and where standard metrics fail.

papers.title: The Org Chart Problem
papers.summary: Why organizational structure determines AI adoption outcomes.

papers.title: The Mandate Trap
papers.summary: Top-down AI mandates vs. bottom-up adoption — which actually drives results.

papers.title: The Integration Tax
papers.summary: Hidden costs of integrating AI into existing workflows and systems.

papers.title: The Six Percent
papers.summary: The small fraction of organizations getting real value from AI — and what they do differently.

papers.title: Beyond the Prompt
papers.summary: Moving past prompt engineering to systematic AI integration.

papers.title: Shift Handoff Intelligence
papers.summary: Maintaining context and knowledge across AI system transitions and human-agent handoffs.

papers.title: The Agentic Accountability Gap
papers.summary: Why governance frameworks built for generative AI fail for agentic systems.
